project_type: Next.js 16 App Router with React 19, financial calculator site
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` to verify the project compiles without errors. There are no unit tests, only Playwright E2E tests which require a running server.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. No Docker needed. Node.js runtime available.
contribution_requirements: Standard Next.js patterns. Components in components/ directory. App router pages in app/ directory.
key_patterns: Client components use 'use client' directive. UI components follow shadcn/ui patterns in components/ui/. Ad-related components in components/ads/. Feature components in components/features/. Hooks in lib/hooks/. The root layout renders Navbar, main content, Footer, CookieConsent, and BotpressLoader. Fixed-position floating elements (CookieConsent, SoftAdBlockMessage) use z-50 and bottom positioning.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router pages and API routes; components/ads/ - ad-related components; components/features/ - feature components like chat, dashboard; components/ui/ - reusable UI primitives (shadcn pattern); components/layouts/ - Navbar, Footer; components/providers/ - context providers; lib/hooks/ - custom React hooks; lib/ - utilities and data
